title: Galacticraft Rich Presence [Galacticraft Addon]
description: An easy way for players and modpack makers alike to show information about the planet, moon or space station a player is visiting on their Discord profile.
body:
Galacticraft Rich Presence is an easy way for players and modpack makers alike to show information about the planet, moon or space station a player is visiting on their Discord profile.

### Supported Addons
- [Extra Planets](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/extraplanets)
- [More Planets](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-planets)
- [Galaxy Space](https://modrinth.com/mod/galaxy-space)
